composite.title: Composite Analysis
composite.subtitle: Composite Analysis
composite.theme9_0_love: Intensely sweet and clingy. The energy field is completely self-sufficient; outsiders can barely enter. The two will be deeply immersed in each other's world, but may feel suffocated or isolated due to lack of external stimulation.
composite.theme9_0_work: Overly closed. The team may have great internal chemistry but easily ignores external market changes or objective feedback from colleagues and clients.
composite.theme8_1_love: The most comfortable dynamic. There is enough energy connection while one open center acts as a window for fresh air. Both have room to breathe independently — a healthy and lasting relationship.
composite.theme8_1_work: Golden partnership. Enough shared intersection to work together, plus one window to explore and experience the outside world.
composite.theme7_2_love: One of the most comfortable dynamics. Two open centers mean both retain enough independent breathing room for long-term harmony.
composite.theme7_2_work: Golden partnership. Strong shared foundation plus two open windows to welcome external stimulation and opportunities.
composite.theme6_3_love: Lighter connection. Too many open areas can lead to flatness or feeling like just friends. Usually needs shared interests, mutual friends, or children to maintain closeness.
composite.theme6_3_work: Good for team collaboration. High independence and freedom, minimal mutual constraint — ideal for loose project collaboration or parallel work in a larger team.
composite.electromagneticDesc: Complementary attraction — one has Gate A, the other has Gate B, together completing the channel. The classic 'fatal attraction' — magnetic but potentially volatile.
composite.companionshipDesc: Comfortable familiarity — both share the same gate or channel, like soulmates who need no words to understand each other.
composite.compromiseDesc: Friction source — one has the full channel, the other has only one gate, which can create long-term imbalance and resentment.
composite.dominanceDesc: One-way influence — one side has energy in a channel, the other is open, receiving a unidirectional conditioning influence.
composite.profileResonanceNone: No shared profile lines — the two have distinct worldview frameworks.
composite.line1Desc: Both need security and solid foundational research — each understands why the other must build from the ground up.
composite.line2Desc: Both need solitude and space to wait for the call — each honors the other's hermit-like need for retreat.
composite.line3Desc: Both understand learning through trial, error, and collision — neither will blame the other for failures.
composite.line4Desc: Both value network and stable community — they build rapport in circle-building and social connection.
composite.line5Desc: Both carry a quality of being projected upon — they need to watch for unrealistic expectations from each other.
composite.line6Desc: Both have a long-arc view of life cycles — each understands the other's phases of stepping back and observing.

about.heading: About SelfMap
about.whatBody: SelfMap was founded by a Projector who loves Human Design, dedicated to helping people understand Human Design and discover their gifts in daily life.
about.techBody: SelfMap uses Swiss Ephemeris as its calculation core, running planetary position calculations in the browser via WebAssembly for precise charts. Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, data stored in PostgreSQL.
about.privacyBody: Your birth data is used solely for chart calculation and will never be used for advertising or third-party analytics. Account data is securely managed through Clerk, and chart data is encrypted.
about.contactBody: For any questions or suggestions, feel free to reach us at 112182ssss@gmail.com. SelfMap is under active development — app support and advanced features may be added in the future.
about.disclaimerBody: The Human Design information and interpretations provided on this site are for reference purposes only and are not a substitute for personal consultations with a qualified Human Design analyst. For in-depth and comprehensive chart readings, we recommend seeking guidance from a certified or formally trained Human Design professional. SelfMap assumes no responsibility for any decisions or outcomes arising from the use of content on this site.

hdPage.heading: Understanding Human Design
hdPage.whatBody: Human Design is an integrative system combining astrology, the I Ching, Kabbalah Tree of Life, Indian chakra system, and quantum physics, received by Ra Uru Hu in 1987 in Ibiza, Spain. It generates a unique Body Graph based on your birth date, time, and location.
hdPage.manifestorDesc: ~9%, has energy to initiate action; strategy is to Inform.
hdPage.generatorDesc: ~37%, has sustained sacral energy; strategy is to Respond.
hdPage.projectorDesc: ~20%, skilled at guiding others; strategy is to Wait for the Invitation.
hdPage.reflectorDesc: ~1%, reflects the environment like the moon; strategy is to Wait a Lunar Cycle.
hdPage.gatesBody: The Body Graph consists of 9 energy centers, 36 channels, and 64 gates, corresponding to the 64 hexagrams of the I Ching. When two gates connect to form a complete channel, the centers they link become 'defined' — your stable energy sources.
hdPage.howBody: Enter your birth data in SelfMap to get a full Human Design analysis, including Type, Authority, Profile, defined centers, and personal theme — helping you understand your nature and decision-making style.

drawer.integrationLead: Four gates and four channels form a closed energy loop. This is the circuit of pure individuality — strong selfhood, instant intuition, immediate action.
drawer.integrationNote: This loop appears in the chart as a trunk (20-57) plus two vertical spurs (gates 10 & 34). All four channels share the same visual structure, so clicking any segment opens this Integration Channels panel.
